Foreign Exchange Reserve (Monthly)
(In million US $)
Period Foreign Exchange Reserves(Gross) Foreign Exchange Reserves(as per BPM6)
2025-2026
March34116.629501.2
February35109.230357.0
January33178.628682.8
December33189.828589.2
November31093.426395.8
October32335.227577.7
September31426.826603.7
August31166.226173.7
July29799.824779.1
2024-2025
June31772.026740.0
May25798.220520.9
April27429.722025.5
March25512.020369.9
February26175.720945.9
January25305.619962.4
December26214.821394.7
November24350.218611.4
October25486.719830.0
September24863.019861.5
August25580.820475.4
July25823.620393.7
2023-2024
June26714.221686.3
May24197.218646.2
April25365.219975.8

Note : Reserves (Gross) represents Total International Reserves of the country.

Source : Accounts & Budgeting Department, Bangladesh Bank.
